creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 177296
patch

The security/linux-c6-nss is vulnerable and Red Hat has released a new version.
https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2016:2779

The attached patch addresses this. I didn't create vuxml patch as I couldn't find the relevant vuxml entry for security/nss port.

It builds fine on Poudriere with 11.0 (c6 and c6_64).
